rule_text: Site for any new AP Government building should be FIXED BEFORE detailed plans and estimates are prepared; the local authority must be consulted on site suitability (except in reserved forests); Military Works Officer must be consulted if site is near a fort or cantonment, with matter reported to Government.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND ConstructionType=NewBuilding
verification_method: Tender file must contain site-fixation order pre-dating detailed plans; local-authority consultation record + military consultation if applicable

rule_text: No AP work may be started before a proper estimate has been prepared and SANCTIONED by the competent authority; estimates must use Common Form 150 (or special form for very large works); every estimate must provide for: rubbish removal, filling unsightly pits, works establishment, incidental costs (worker sheds, store sheds), and watchmen for vacant buildings.
verification_method: Check tender estimate uses Form 150; verify estimate includes incidental items; reject if started without sanctioned estimate (except Articles 169-170 emergency)
